meaning: n.初步设计的模型(或草图)
examples: Maquette of the sculpture is not completed art work, just the beginning of creative.
The design for Gollum took over 100 maquette sculptures and over 1000 drawings to get right.
I created a life size maquette and worked closely with foundry artisans to produce the completed bronze.
In another maquette, the Shoggoth had sprouted two heads, each extending from brontosaurus-like necks.
The maquette for the sculpture is on display at the Royal Academy in London.
